app.name: Lazy Patta
welcome.tagline: The card games we grew up playing.
welcome.noBetting: No cash. No betting. Just family fun.
game.cardsRemainingCount: {count, plural, one {# card remaining} other {# cards remaining}}
error.recoverable: Something slipped. You can safely return to setup and try again.
computer.setupTitle: Gadha Chor at the family table
computer.setupDescription: Set a small table, meet the bots, and play a guided computer round that keeps card rules inside the controller boundary.
computer.setupInstruction: Choose your table size, then start dealing.
computer.quickRulePairs: Pairs are cleared when the controller confirms them.
computer.quickRulePick: On your turn, tap one face-down opponent card. No dragging.
computer.quickRuleLast: The last player holding the unpaired card becomes Gadha Chor.
computer.dealingInstruction: Cards are being dealt around the table.
computer.initialPairsInstruction: Initial pairs are clearing before the first turn.
computer.finishedInstruction: {name} has finished and stays visible at the table.
computer.resultInstruction: Round complete. Take a breath and play again when ready.
computer.eventInitialPairs: Opening pairs moved to the center.
computer.eventHumanTurn: Your eligible opponent cards are lifted.
computer.tablePanelSubtitle: Sound and motion stay secondary to play.
computer.gadhaChorReveal: A gentle Gadha Chor reveal, no teasing and no fake rewards.
card.hiddenAccessible: Hidden card {position} from {name}. Card identity is not revealed.
